Field.js-content: var MainRef = tsu.getValue("Document/InitlBaselnSubmissn/SubmitrTxRef","Id"); tsu.setHashMap("C_MAIN_REF",MainRef[0]);

Field.name: JS
Field.js-content: var MainRef = tsu.getValue("Document/BaselnReSubmissn/SubmitrTxRef","Id"); tsu.setHashMap("C_MAIN_REF",MainRef[0]);
